title: Wave5 doctor + config 重排:B-横线标题 + 健康徽章 + C-圆点分组(废树形线)+ config 留白键值展示/编辑流平铺
description: Re-lay-out the doctor human report and the config display/edit flow to the flat language. doctor.ts: renderDoctorHeader → B-横线 (headerRule) + a health badge; renderDoctorStoreHealth + renderDoctorChecks drop the `tree()` branch lines in favor of C-圆点 groups (`● Store Health` / `● Checks`) with plain-indented rows. config.ts: the key/value display becomes留白 plain rows (no gutter), the clack select/text edit flow stays native (回执 from TASK-004). Reuse the new CLI-local headerRule/groupDot — do NOT touch shared sectionBar.
action: doctor.ts: renderDoctorHeader returns `${headerRule('fabric doctor · ' + target)} ${renderStatus(status)}` (B-横线 + health badge) instead of sectionBar. renderDoctorStoreHealth + renderDoctorChecks: replace `${sectionBar('Store Health')}\n${tree(rows)}` with `${groupDot(t(...))}` header + rows rendered as plain `  <badge><ref> <message>` lines (no `├─`/`└─`). renderFixKnowledgeMutations / writeIssueSection section headers move to groupDot. config.ts: the display function renders each field as a gutter-free `  <label>: <value>` row under a headerRule title; the select/text edit path is unchanged (native clack). Keep all status badges as the existing symbol() ✓/!/x.

criteria: doctor.ts renderDoctorHeader uses headerRule (grep 'headerRule' in doctor.ts), NOT sectionBar, and appends a status/health badge

doctor.ts renderDoctorStoreHealth + renderDoctorChecks no longer call tree() for the section body (grep 'tree(' in doctor.ts returns no match in those two functions) and use groupDot for the section header
config.ts display renders gutter-free key/value rows (grep config.ts contains NO `│` literal in the display path) under a headerRule title
Any new section-label strings are defined in BOTH en.ts and zh-CN.ts (grep the new keys in both files); existing 'Store Health'/'Checks' wording preserved or localized in both locales
[UI-observable] running `fabric doctor` shows a B-横线 header with a health badge and `● Store Health` / `● Checks` groups with plain-indented rows (no `├─`/`└─` tree branches)
[UI-observable] running `fabric config` shows a flat key/value panel (no `│` gutter) before the clack edit prompt

pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared test exits 0 (locale parity) && pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test exits 0 (doctor-reskin.test.ts / config tests updated) && pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit exits 0
convergence.verification: Inspect doctor.ts render* funcs for headerRule/groupDot and absence of tree(); update doctor-reskin.test.ts (NO_COLOR snapshot) to the new flat output; run shared+cli tests + tsc; eyeball `fabric doctor` + `fabric config`.
convergence.definition_of_done: The doctor report and config display render in the flat B-横线 + C-圆点 language with no tree branches and no output-side `│`, while the config edit flow stays native clack with the TASK-004 receipt.

files.change: Header → headerRule + health badge. Section bodies → groupDot header + plain-indented rows; drop tree(). Status badges stay symbol() ✓/!/x.
Render key/value rows gutter-free under a headerRule title; leave the clack select/text edit native (receipt from TASK-004).
Add any new doctor/config section-label keys (e.g. cli.doctor.group.store-health, cli.doctor.group.checks) if the existing literals are not already keyed.
Add the SAME new keys with zh-CN values.

implementation: Refactor doctor.ts render* to headerRule + groupDot, dropping tree() in the two section bodies; add a health badge to the header.
Refactor config.ts display to gutter-free key/value rows under a headerRule title.
Add/route any new section labels through both locale tables.
Update doctor-reskin.test.ts + config snapshot/unit tests to the new flat output.

success_metrics: doctor uses B-横线 + C-圆点, no tree branches

reference.pattern: doctor.ts existing render* pure composers (renderDoctorHeader/Checks/StoreHealth) — swap sectionBar→headerRule, tree→groupDot+plain rows

rationale.chosen_approach: Reuse the Wave-1 headerRule/groupDot primitives; preserve the diagnostic row wording so existing string assertions / JSON output stay intact — only structure changes.
decision_factors: spec §2 doctor = B-横线 + 健康徽章 + C-圆点; 废树形线
JSON output path must stay untouched

risks: doctor-reskin.test.ts pins the old tree/sectionBar output — must be regenerated, not skipped; the JSON (args.json) path must NOT be touched.
